title: Autonomous Science Agents - Researcher Index
description: A curated, filterable catalog of autonomous and agentic scientific systems, self-driving laboratories, and evaluation benchmarks across STEM.

affiliation.name: Institute of Molecular Genetics of the Czech Academy of Sciences
Institute of Molecular Genetics of the Czech Academy of Sciences

rights_statement: Catalog data, metadata, and original documentation are licensed under CC BY 4.0; maintenance and build software are licensed under MIT. Third-party papers, external software, services, logos, and trademarks remain under their own terms. IMG CAS is the curator's affiliation, not the publisher or an endorsement.
provenance: Curated from primary papers, official repositories, project pages, and benchmark documentation; generated from the canonical JSON source with a deterministic local build. Every displayed record carries dated source evidence, while known limitations remain explicit.
evidence_statement: Catalog version 2.0.1 modified 2026-07-14; all records carry explicit evidence-verification dates, and the release audit records remaining limitations without treating a rebuild as re-verification.
